headline: Burry Is Backing Adobe Inc (ADBE) Despite Analyst Downgrades
summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) is one of the 9 Stocks Big Short’s Michael Burry Is Betting On. On April 27, Mizuho analyst Gregg Moskowitz set a target price of $270 for Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) and downgraded it to Neutral from Outperform. This reflects an upside of 7.9% from here on. This is a significantly bearish stance […]

headline: Adobe Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: Although Adobe has underperformed relative to the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Adobe: The Market Refuses To See AI As A Tailwind
summary: Adobe stock looks undervalued at <10x FY27 P/E amid solid growth and AI monetization. Here's what investors need to know.
